text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Super Creek face off in a
scrimmage on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a nail-bitingly close battle, the race ends in
a draw.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap suppresses her frustration as she
watches Super Creek walk away.
